entities.name: Two-track JD strategy
entities.context: Hiring framework with high-brow (growth teammate) and low-brow (volume/outreach) tracks

entities.name: Stories
entities.context: Voice-based guided reflection sessions; heart of Careerspan candidate experience

entities.name: Productive friction
entities.context: Design principle using coaching conversations and reflection to filter for high-agency candidates

entities.name: Dealbreakers
entities.context: Candidate constraints (e.g., benefits requirements) surfaced on employer dashboard

entities.name: Employer dashboard
entities.context: Careerspan interface showing candidate scores, summaries, dealbreakers, and yes/no reasons

entities.name: Candidate experience
entities.context: Careerspan flow: resume upload, onboarding questions, voice-based story sessions

relationships.context: Brainstorms two-track hiring strategy and demonstrates Careerspan for Afraaz's patient outreach hiring
Stories are the heart of the candidate experience, producing rich qualitative data
Two coaching conversations and ~40 min reflection filter for high-agency candidates
Dashboard surfaces scores, dealbreakers, and concise yes/no reasons
Indeed suited for low-brow/volume track of the strategy
Wellfound suited for startup-savvy, potentially high-brow candidates
Proposed use case: push job links widely, let Careerspan screen for empathy and communication
